title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Explodes 267% to Reach $9.47, Breaks Into Top 50 Cryptocurrencies
excerpt: RaveDAO token has surged an incredible 267% in 24 hours, catapulting the project to rank #41 by market capitalization. The dramatic price movement has brought RAVE to $9.47, marking one of the most significant single-day gains in the altcoin market this month.
